observation.summary: Distribution host integration invariant docs described C11 host surfaces, but the reader-facing invariant pages were still manually edited markdown.

hypothesis.summary: A distribution-host-invariants manifest can generate the C11 invariant pages and verify source anchors in hostintegration models, tests, and store-distribution contracts.

execution.summary: Generate the invariant index and detail pages from SSOT fragments, preserving the existing C11 runtime behavior.

evaluation.summary: The verifier rejects generated doc drift, missing source anchors, missing fragments, missing workflow wiring, and missing coverage registration.

retrospective.summary: C11 invariant knowledge becomes generated evidence and shrinks the largest remaining manual domain hotspot without changing runtime behavior.

evidence.proves: distribution host invariant docs are generated and source anchors still exist
hostintegration domain facts and store distribution contract still match the generated invariant boundary
public CI uploads distribution host invariant evidence
